name.description: Name of the action to take

Exclude.description: A list of classes that a rule explicitly DOES NOT apply to.

Include.description: A list of classes that a rule explicitly applies to. Use 'All' when a rule applies to all classes

Exclude.description: A list of domains that a rule explicitly DOES NOT apply to.

Include.description: A list of domains that a rule explicitly applies to. Use 'All' when a rule applies to all domains

id.description: Unique id for referencing a rule

severity.description: Describes how severe a rule violatio is

standards.description: All standards the rule applies to

items.description: Name and version of a standard

Exclude.description: A list of classes that a rule explicitly DOES NOT apply to.

Include.description: A list of classes that a rule explicitly applies to. Use 'All' when a rule applies to all classes

Exclude.description: A list of domains that a rule explicitly DOES NOT apply to.

Include.description: A list of domains that a rule explicitly applies to. Use 'All' when a rule applies to all domains

rules.description: Mapping of rule id to rule definition

standard.description: Name and version of a standard

use_case_list.description: List of use cases for a given standard

use_case_section_documents.description: Documents for a given use case and section

use_case_sections_list.description: List of sections for a given use case
